lesson.menu_title: A Memorable Day -- Past Simple Questions & a Weekend Recap
lesson.menu_desc: Ask about the past: Did you...? What did you do? Where did you go? Talk about your weekend -- party, visit, museum, enjoy, fun -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- A Memorable Day: Past Simple Questions & a Weekend Recap
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 15 -- A Memorable Day

listenings.text: Hello. Let me tell you about my weekend. It was a special weekend. On Saturday, I went to a party at my friend's house. There were many people. We ate good food and we listened to music. I enjoyed it a lot. On Sunday, I visited a museum in the city. I walked for two hours and I saw beautiful art. It was a calm day. In the evening, I called my daughter. We talked for one hour. It was a memorable weekend, and it was a lot of fun.

Hi. I want to tell you about my last weekend. On Saturday morning, I stayed at home and I read a book. In the afternoon, I visited my parents. We had lunch together and we talked a lot. On Sunday, my wife and I went to a small party. We met old friends and we enjoyed the evening. I did not work, so I relaxed. It was a quiet weekend, but it was special for me. I felt happy and calm.

extra_audio.text: First, I ask: How was your weekend? Second, I ask: What did you do? Third, my friend answers: I went to a party. Fourth, I ask: Did you enjoy it? Fifth, my friend answers: Yes, I did. It was fun.
